tool_args.label: Farebox Revenue YTD March 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Farebox revenue of $139.6 million was $10.4 million higher than the Budget

evidence_refs.source_quote: Farebox revenue of $139.6 million was $10.4 million higher than the Budget
Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $456.7 million were $16.8 million or 3.8% unfavorable to the Budget
the total headcount was 6,594 which was 70 higher than the Budget of 6,524
Commutation ridership of 6.0 million was 6.4% above 2023 and 36.8% above the Budget

tool_args.label: Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio YTD March 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date March Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio was 40.8%, which was higher than the Budget due to higher farebox revenue

tool_args.label: Adjusted Cost per Passenger YTD March 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date March Adjusted Cost per Passenger was $25.53, which was lower than the Budget
The year-to-date March Revenue per Passenger was $9.29, which was lower than the Budget
Non-commutation ridership of 9.1 million was 18.1% above 2023 and 3.9% below the Budget

payload.raw_value_text: unfavorable to the Budget by $13.1 million or 4.2%

evidence_refs.source_quote: March YTD non-reimbursable operating results were unfavorable to the Budget by $13.1 million or 4.2%
Labor Expenses: $35.0 million unfavorable to the Budget
Non-Labor Expenses: $8.8 million favorable to the Budget
Total overtime was $3.7 million unfavorable to the Budget. Non-reimbursable was $5.5 million unfavorable and reimbursable was $1.9 million favorable
Electric Power was $10.9 million favorable to the Budget due to lower rates and consumption
Total 15.037 million riders YTD
